Title: Successful User Authentication
Preconditions: User is registered in the system.
Test Data: Username and password for a valid user.
Test Steps:
1. User enters username and password into the Local User interface.
2. Local User sends the credentials to the Main component.
3. Main component requests authentication from the Data Manager.
4. Data Manager verifies the credentials and returns a success message.
5. Main component confirms authentication to the Local User.
6. Local User requests data from the Main component.
7. Main component sends the requested data to the Local User.
8. Local User processes the data and confirms receipt.
9. Local User requests data modification from the Main component.
10. Main component sends the modified data to the Data Manager.
11. Data Manager updates the data and confirms success to the Main component.
12. Main component confirms the update to the Local User.
13. Local User requests a report from the Main component.
14. Main component requests data from the Data Manager.
15. Data Manager provides the report data and confirms success to the Main component.
16. Main component sends the report to the Local User.
17. Local User deletes the report.
18. Local User confirms deletion to the Main component.
19. Main component confirms the deletion to the Local User.
Expected Result: All steps should succeed, and the user should be authenticated and able to perform all actions.

Title: Failed User Authentication
Preconditions: User is registered in the system.
Test Steps:
1. User enters an invalid username or password into the Local User interface.
2. Local User sends the credentials to the Main component.
3. Main component requests authentication from the Data Manager.
4. Data Manager returns a failure message due to invalid credentials.
5. Main component confirms the failure to the Local User.
Expected Result: Authentication should fail, and the user should not be able to proceed with further actions.

8. Data Manager provides the report data and confirms success.
9. Main component sends the report to the Local User.

Expected Result: Data should be successfully added, and the user should be able to generate and delete reports.
